$comment: RESOLUTION-MEMORY TEMPLATE. sync.py consults this BEFORE prompting: any ambiguity whose id is recorded here is auto-applied (seamless re-sync). Keys are the EXACT ids the detector emits — 'role:<role>' for cross-target divergence, 'type:<value>' for a contract-illegal catalog value. Add entries only via `--resolve` or a reviewed seed; copy the id verbatim from `sync.py --check --json`.

resolutions.$comment: Example entry — delete it. Recorded the day two targets diverged on the `send` role; `unify-to` forces both onto one canonical value via effective(binding).

role:send.rationale: Replace with the real reason the decision was made — future-you re-reads this instead of re-litigating.
